parts.name: Part 1
parts.instructions: You must answer this question. Write 140-190 words in an appropriate style.

tasks.lead: In your English class you have been talking about work and money. Now your English teacher has asked you to write an essay. Write an essay using all the notes and giving reasons for your point of view.

stimulus.body:
"It is a good idea for teenagers to have a part-time job while they are still at school. Do you agree?"

Notes

Write about:
1. money
2. schoolwork
3. ............... (your own idea)

bullets: give reasons for your point of view

parts.name: Part 2
parts.instructions: Answer one of these questions. Write 140-190 words in an appropriate style.

tasks.lead: The principal of your college wants to help students find part-time work and has asked you to write a report.

stimulus.title: Report: part-time work for students
stimulus.body: Describe the kinds of part-time work available to students in your area, explain the main problems students have when looking for a job, and suggest one way the college could help.

bullets: the kinds of part-time work available locally
the main problems students face when job-hunting
one way the college could help

tasks.lead: You have received this letter from your English-speaking friend Jamie.

stimulus.body:
Guess what — I've just been offered my first ever weekend job, in a busy café! I'm excited but also quite nervous, because I've never worked anywhere before. You've had a job for a while now, haven't you? What's the hardest thing about working while studying? And is there anything I should definitely do in my first week?
Write soon,
Jamie

bullets: how you feel about Jamie's news
the hardest thing about working while studying

tasks.lead: You see this announcement in an English-language magazine for young people.

stimulus.title: MY FIRST TIME EARNING MONEY
stimulus.body: Whether it was babysitting, selling old games online or washing cars, everyone remembers the first time they earned their own money. Write an article telling us what you did, what surprised you about it, and what the experience taught you. We will publish the most interesting articles.

bullets: what you did to earn money
